prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CARVSPATULA-PICK-12PC-IR-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Wax Carver Spatula Tips Pick Set Crafting Tools 12pc Description: The ToolTreaux deluxe set of wax carvers features 12 different double-ended spatula tools for a variety of crafting uses like sculpting, carving, picking, jewelry making, make up special effects and more. Each set comes with 24 assorted tips that make the ultimate set of multi-tools for precision work crafting projects.

These spatula tools are constructed of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won't rust, making them ideal for use with both wet and dry mediums. The corrosion-resistant material will ensure a long life for your tools (just make sure to wipe them clean and dry them before you put them away).

Originally designed for precision work, these craft-specific pick tools are great for cleaning small parts, carving wax, creating designs, modeling, molding and smoothing. Some recommended mediums for spatula pick tools are ceramics, jewelry and clay.

Featuring gripped handles, these tools are shaped for comfort and balance to prevent slippage during use, protecting your hands from the picks. Each tool measures about 6.5" in length, and the entire set will easily fit inside most standard tool boxes and craft storage containers. We've also included a PVC storage pouch to keep them all safe and organized when not in use. Search Terms: spatula set metal spatula makeup spatula small spatula stainless steel pottery tools clay tools sculpting tools modeling tools jewelry making supplies tools tweezers precision makeup tools wood carving tools carving knife craft organizers and Features: - DOUBLE-ENDED ASSORTED TIPS - ToolTreaux set of wax carvers features 12 different double-sided spatula tools for a variety of crafting uses like carving, picking, sculpting, jewelry making, make up and special effects. 24 different tips make up the ultimate set of multi-tools for any crafting project requiring precision work - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Wax carver spatulas are made of high-quality stainless steel that won't rust, making it ideal for use with both wet and dry mediums. Corrosion-resistant material ensures a long life for your tools - VERSATILE CRAFTING TOOLS - Originally designed for precision work, these craft-specific pick tools are great for carving wax, cleaning small parts, creating designs, molding, modeling, and smoothing. Ideal mediums: ceramics, jewelry, clay and electronics - ERGONOMIC HANDLES - Featuring gripped handles, these tools are shaped for balance and comfort to prevent slippage during use. Measuring 6.5" in length, entire set will easily fit inside most standard tool boxes and craft storage containers - SPECIFICATIONS - 12pc set; Assorted tips: 24 (double-sided); Material: stainless steel: Handle style: ergonomic grip: Dimensions: 6.5" x .6" x .6"; Color: chrome; PVC storage pouch included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
